name: Orbit CRM
summary: A lightweight CRM for freelancers — pipeline tracking, invoice generation, and client timelines.
highlights: Built REST API with JWT auth and role-based access
Cut invoice creation time from 6 minutes to under 40 seconds
Deployed with CI/CD via GitHub Actions

name: Pulse Analytics
summary: Real-time dashboard visualizing website traffic using WebSockets and D3.
highlights: Streams live event data to 500+ concurrent dashboard sessions
Custom charting layer built without a charting library

name: RecipeBox
summary: A public REST API for community recipes, with search, ratings, and image uploads.
highlights: Designed normalized schema across 8 related tables
Wrote OpenAPI docs consumed by 3 external student projects

name: StudyFlow
summary: Capstone project for the Web Development diploma — a Pomodoro-based study planner with progress analytics.
highlights: Graded top of cohort for architecture and code quality
Implemented offline-first mode with localStorage sync queue
Presented to a panel of 5 industry reviewers
